sub_modules.bpf_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM that returns the exact hard-coded 101-tap signed FIR coefficient for each tap index.
sub_modules.bpf_tap_multiply: Combinational signed multiplier for one delayed sample and one FIR coefficient.
sub_modules.bpf_accumulator: Combinational wide signed adder that sums all tap products into a 64-bit accumulator.
sub_modules.bpf_output_scaler: Combinational fixed-point output scaler that arithmetic-right-shifts the accumulator to the 24-bit output width.
